title: Rank floor column - contrast and rank-set evidence

superseded_claim.note: The earlier figure was not reproducible. Both values clear the 7:1 bar; the record is corrected rather than left standing.

reproducibility.behaviour: Parses the hex literals for --ink and --surface out of static/css/base.css and recomputes the ratio at test time, so the evidence cannot drift from the deployed tokens without failing.

responsive_evidence.defect_fixed: .arena-rank-spine had `display: none` inside @media (max-width: 767px), removing the entire eight-rank progression below 768px.
responsive_evidence.replacement: At <=767px the column leaves the floor overlay and becomes a compact wrapped row in normal flow (position: static, flex-wrap: wrap), keeping all eight ranks present and readable.
responsive_evidence.javascript: placeRankSpine() clears its measured inline top/left/width at <=767px so the stylesheet owns the mobile layout; inline styles would otherwise win.

accessibility_evidence.structure: The ladder is an <ol class="arena-rank-spine__list"> of <li> items inside the existing <nav aria-label="Kitchen rank ladder">, so the ordering is conveyed semantically rather than by visual stacking alone.
accessibility_evidence.labels: Each step carries aria-label="<Rank> - N chef(s)"; the on-screen bare numeral is aria-hidden so a screen reader never reads a number with no noun.
accessibility_evidence.colour_independence: Progression is carried by the rank text and list order, not by colour.

r4_composition.owner_d1: Option B — centred rank stack (overturn GreenBear side-column Option A)

focused_tests.note: Includes post-R4 Option B centre assertion and progression label markup.

verification_close_2026_07_24.contrast_reconfirmed: Still --ink on --surface / --surface-soft via official tokens after R4 hex chips; original 14.30:1 / 12.62:1 measurements remain valid.

distributed_8_6_1.honesty: Owner D4 exempted full 8:6:1 while pool depleted for focused slices. Not claimed.

authenticated_browser_qa.note: Optional FE browser QA offered; BE closes on automated + audit evidence only.

verification_close_2026_07_24.board_status: DONE — FOCUSED VERIFY (R4 Option B); 8:6:1 not claimed
